---
title: "Notes"
---

Notes organised by form.

## [Papers](./papers/index.qmd)

Per-paper notes — one file per paper.

## [Points](./points/index.qmd)

Extracted observations, arguments, and claims from the literature.
Not findings; views worth referencing.

## [Hiatus Paper Collection](./hiatus-paper-collection.qmd)

Collected sentences and excerpts from related papers,
useful for writing.
